title: Naming of certain buildings, parks and civic complex by the governing authority of certain parishes
doc_html:
§4712.23. Naming of certain buildings, parks, and civic complexes by the governing authority of certain parishes

            Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority of a parish with a population of not less than three hundred forty thousand and not more than four hundred twenty thousand persons according to the most recent federal decennial census may name certain buildings, parks, and civic complexes in honor of a living person.

            Acts 2019, No. 356, §1.
doc_text:
§4712.23.  Naming of certain buildings, parks, and civic complexes by the governing
authority of certain parishes
Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority
of a parish with a population of not less than three hundred forty thousand and not more than
four hundred twenty thousand persons according to the most recent federal decennial census
may name certain buildings, parks, and civic complexes in honor of a living person.
Acts 2019, No. 356, §1.
